div.h3: MPMC (Multi-Producer Multi-Consumer) Ring Buffer State Lifecycle

g.text: 1. Race Condition: Thread Interleaving (The ABA Scenario)

g.title: B completes full write. seq becomes 6.
Consumer empties slot. Buffer cycles Capacity times.

ol.li: Buffer wraps exactly 2^32 or Capacity times.
seq is back to 5 due to overflow/wrap.
A's CAS(5, 6) succeeds even though the slot data is stale!

div.p: With a 64-bit sequence, even at 10 million ops/sec, the counter won't wrap for 58,000 years.
Thread A reads seq=5. Thread B completes. Slot is consumed. Slot wraps. New seq = 5 + Capacity.
Thread A attempts CAS(&seq, 5, 6). Since 5 + Capacity != 5, the CAS FAILS. No corruption possible.
Sequence: 0x00...0005 Data: [ EMPTY ] Thread A: Loading...
Sequence: 0x00...0005 Data: [ DIRTY / PREV_DATA ] Status: ABA Vulnerable
⚠️ FAIL: A overwrote current live data because seq matched!

g.title: B completes full write. seq becomes 6.
Consumer empties slot. Buffer cycles Capacity times.
